DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER EMBY'S MOTION FOR ORDER AWARDING TERMINATING SANCTIONS, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, AWARDING EVIDENCE SANCTIONS, AND MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST DEFENDANT FRANCESCA M. MARSH. MOTION IS CONTINUED TO MAY 5, 2020. DEFENDANT IS GIVEN THE OPPORTUNITY TO RESPOND TO ALL OUTSTANDING DISCOVERY AND TO PROVIDE A DECLARATION EXPLAINING THE REASON FOR FAILURE TO TIMELY RESPOND TO PREVIOUS COURT ORDER. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL WILL BE SANCTIONE FOR FAILURE TO RESPOND TO PREVIOUS COURT ORDER AND ADDITIONAL TIME SPENT BY PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL RESPONDING TO WITHIN MOTION. JUDGE PRO TEM: STEVEN STEIN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, IN RESPONSE TO THE COVID-19 OUTBREAK, THE HEARING DATES FOR ALL LAW AND MOTION AND DISCOVERY MATTERS IN DEPARTMENT 302 FILED BEFORE JUNE 1, 2020 ARE OFF CALENDAR PURSUANT TO THE COURT'S GENERAL ORDERS. TO RE-SCHEDULE THE HEARING, PLEASE REFER TO THE PUBLIC NOTICE TO RESTORE SERVICES ISSUED ON MAY 27, 2020 AVAILABLE ON THE COURT'S WEBSITE AT HTTPS://SFSUPERIORCOURT.ORG/. (302/EPS)

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER EMBY'S MOTION IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FOR ORDER DEEMING ADMITTED PLAINTIFFS REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS, MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING DEFENDANT FRANCESCA M. MARSHS RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFFS FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET NO 1, FIRST SET OF SPECIALLY PREPARED INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, COMPELLING DEFENDANT TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS FOR INSPECTION, COPYING, TESTING OR SAMPLING, AND IMPOSING SANCTIONS ON THE DEFENDANT AND HER ATTORNEY IS GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS NOS. 1-44 ARE DEEMED ADMITTED AS TO DEFENDANT FRANCESCA MARSH. DEFENDANT SHALL PROVIDE VERIFIED, CODE-COMPLIANT RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE), SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE), AND REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS (SET ONE), WITHOUT OBJECTIONS EXCEPT PRIVILEGE, AND RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS WITHIN 30 DAYS. DEFENDANT MARSH SHALL PAY SANCTIONS TO MICHAEL B. BASSI, A LAW CORPORATION, IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,500 WITHIN 30 DAYS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: AARON MINNIS, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, OCT-27-2020 HEARING HELD RE: PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER EMBY'S MOTION FOR ORDER AWARDING TERMINATING SANCTIONS, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, AWARDING EVIDENCE SANCTIONS, AND MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST DEFENDANT FRANCESCA M. MARSH. THE COURT CONTINUES THIS MATTER FOR FURTHER HEARING TO NOVEMBER 24, 2020 AT 9:00 A.M. ON THE DISCOVERY CALENDAR. THE COURT ORDERS THE PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER IMMEDIATELY TO DISCUSS WHAT IS REQUIRED FOR THE SETTLEMENT PROCESS TO BE COMPLETED. THE COURT DEFERS ON THE ISSUE OF MONETARY SANCTIONS AT THIS TIME TO BE CONSIDERED LATER. THE PARTIES HAVE AGREED TO CONTINUE THE DEPOSITION DATE TO NOVEMBER 12, 2020. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IS TO PREPARE AND EMAIL A PROPOSED ORDER TO DEFENSE COUNSEL FOR APPROVAL AND THEN EMAIL THE PROPOSED ORDER TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT SBS@SBSLAWSF.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: STEVE STEIN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)
